title: Benefits to service
description: The Army offers a wide-range of options for leave, flexible working, and discounts that serve to support you and your family beyond the basic offer. These entitlements include: Leave, Flexible Working. Flexible Service, Professional Development  Adventurous Training and more.
text:
The Army offers a wide-range of options for leave, flexible working, and discounts that serve to support you and your family beyond the basic offer.
These entitlements include:
Leave
Flexible Working
Flexible Service
Professional Development
Adventurous Training
